title: Buggy’s Cannon Threatens Orange Town
main_description: Buggy’s occupation becomes more destructive as the cannon and his crew put Orange Town in danger. Luffy’s stubbornness and Nami’s conflicted position drive the chapter toward open resistance.
key_events: Buggy’s crew shows the destructive power of its cannon.
Nami is forced deeper into the conflict.
Luffy resists Buggy despite being trapped.
Orange Town’s civilians become part of the stakes.
review_reasons: Some dialogue-heavy parts still contain many unresolved speakers.
